policy: Prove neutral read-only compatibility views exist for staged data-bearing versioned SQL tables. This artifact does not authorize production migration application, policy duplication, writes, backfills, or legacy object removal.

rows.reason: Versioned SQL object names require forward-compatible aliases or views before application code can move.
rows.manualFollowUp: Do not remove the legacy SQL object until production cutover evidence exists and the compatibility removal queue is ready_for_removal.
